meaning: n.中部地方,内地adj.在内陆的
examples: Midland decided to change the way it credited payments to accounts.
Each year red-winged blackbirds stop in a certain region of Midland Province on their spring and fall migration.
This year Midland farmers sought permits to set out small amounts of poisoned rice during the blackbirds' spring stop in order to reduce the fall blackbird population.
Of greater concern though was London Midland, which has had a number of reliability problems.
You can learn a lot about business cycles in Midland (pop. 100, 000), 300 miles west of Fort Worth.
